purpose: Normalize stale audit modules whose production gaps have landed, without hiding still-real gaps or deleting retained audit files.

guardrails: No audit file may be deleted as part of this normalization.
A module with a still-real gap must name a blocker bead instead of being silently downgraded.
Production-live pass records must use evidence_quality=live under the shared mock-code-finder schema.
Generated artifacts must be deterministic and must not include secret values.
